asset.title: App Ask Reconcile
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: Excellent demonstration of the `/ask reconcile` command. The agent locks the spreadsheet, performs the reconciliation against NetSuite, updates the variance column, and releases the lock, with all steps visible in the trace.

featureClarity.evidence: Clear demonstration of the `/ask reconcile` command updating spreadsheet cells.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full sequence from command input to agent execution, cell updates, and lock release.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout with well-structured chat, spreadsheet, and trace panels.

consistency.evidence: Perfect alignment with NodeRoom's spreadsheet, agent, and trace log paradigm.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and log updates.

legibility.evidence: Main UI text is highly legible, though trace logs are slightly small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses financial reconciliation use cases relevant to business users.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step execution and locking mechanism of the agent.

observedEvidence: Agent locking spreadsheet and updating variance cells
Room trace log updating in real-time
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch the NodeRoom agent reconcile Q3 revenue against NetSuite exports, automatically updating the spreadsheet variance and logging its steps in the trace.
